data: Chains A and B represent two conformers of residues 16-19 and 46-47. Chemical shifts are reported in chemical_shifts_chainA.str. The connectivity between the two conformers for residues 16-17 is not clear.

Chains A and B represent two conformers of residues 16-19 and 46-47. Chemical shifts are reported in chemical_shifts_chainB.str. The connectivity between the two conformers for residues 16-17 is not clear.
